summary: Instrumentation now captures structured logs, heartbeat telemetry, and SQLite persistence for each Maestro Baileys instance.

instances.observations: connection.update events now record normalized disconnect reason + category (e.g. conflict/sessionExpired) before reconnect attempts are scheduled.
Used as baseline by the diag endpoint; heartbeats and event counts captured to compare against the problematic instance.

diagEndpoints.details: returns summaries, event history, disconnect counts, durations, heartbeats

monitoring.behavior: Polls diag endpoint every 30s, records new disconnect IDs, writes latest + NDJSON history

hypothesis: inst_691e0bb420cbd experiences repeated connection resets (category conflict/connectionClosed) before a reconnect attempt; likely residual session data or race on concurrent logins triggering WhatsApp conflicts.
